en: Praise the LORD!Praise the name of the LORD, give praise, O servants of the LORD,
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華， 你們要讚美耶和華的名； 耶和華的眾僕人哪！你們都要讚美他。

en: who stand in the house of the LORD, in the courts of the house of our God!
zh: 在耶和華殿中侍候的， 在我們 神殿的院裡侍候的， 你們要讚美他。

en: Praise the LORD, for the LORD is good; sing to his name, for it is pleasant!
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華， 因耶和華本是良善的； 你們要歌頌他的名， 因為他的名是美好的。

en: For the LORD has chosen Jacob for himself, Israel as his own possession.
zh: 因為耶和華揀選了雅各歸他自己， 揀選了以色列作他自己的產業。

en: For I know that the LORD is great, and that our Lord is above all gods.
zh: 我確實知道耶和華是偉大的， 我們的主超越萬神之上。

en: Whatever the LORD pleases, he does, in heaven and on earth, in the seas and all deeps.
zh: 在天上，在地上，在海中，在一切深處， 耶和華喜歡甚麼，就作甚麼。

en: He it is who makes the clouds rise at the end of the earth, who makes lightnings for the rain and brings forth the wind from his storehouses.
zh: 他使雲霧從地極上升， 發出閃電隨雨而來， 又從他的府庫吹出風來。

en: He it was who struck down the firstborn of Egypt, both of man and of beast;
zh: 他把埃及頭生的， 無論人或牲畜都擊殺了。

en: who in your midst, O Egypt, sent signs and wonders against Pharaoh and all his servants;
zh: 埃及啊！他在你當中施行神蹟和奇事， 懲罰法老和他所有的臣僕。

en: who struck down many nations and killed mighty kings,
zh: 他擊殺了多國的民， 殺戮了強悍的王，

en: Sihon, king of the Amorites, and Og, king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan,
zh: 就是亞摩利王西宏、 巴珊王噩， 和迦南列國的王。

en: and gave their land as a heritage, a heritage to his people Israel.
zh: 他把他們的地 賜給了自己的子民以色列作產業。

en: Your name, O LORD, endures forever, your renown, O LORD, throughout all ages.
zh: 耶和華啊！你的名存到永遠； 耶和華啊！你可記念的名留存萬代。

en: For the LORD will vindicate his people and have compassion on his servants.
zh: 因為耶和華要為自己的子民伸冤， 他要憐憫自己的僕人。

en: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, the work of human hands.
zh: 列國的偶像是金的銀的， 是人手所做的。

en: They have mouths, but do not speak; they have eyes, but do not see;
zh: 有口卻不能說話， 有眼卻不能看，

en: they have ears, but do not hear, nor is there any breath in their mouths.
zh: 有耳卻不能聽， 口中也沒有氣息。

en: Those who make them become like them, so do all who trust in them!
zh: 做偶像的必和它們一樣， 所有倚靠它們的也必這樣。

en: O house of Israel, bless the LORD! O house of Aaron, bless the LORD!
zh: 以色列家啊！你們要稱頌耶和華； 亞倫家啊！你們要稱頌耶和華；

en: O house of Levi, bless the LORD! You who fear the LORD, bless the LORD!
zh: 利未家啊！你們要稱頌耶和華； 敬畏耶和華的，你們要稱頌耶和華。

en: Blessed be the LORD from Zion, he who dwells in Jerusalem! Praise the LORD!
zh: 從錫安來的耶和華， 就是住在耶路撒冷的，是應當稱頌的。 你們要讚美耶和華。
